title: Asset dependencies across code locations
reason: A correctly cites AssetSpec/deps for cross-location deps, while B invents a nonexistent ExternalAsset constructor API.

title: How to clenup table event_logs?
reason: A gives valid SQL cleanup grounded in real Dagster docs, while B fabricates non-existent retention config and CLI commands contradicting the reference's note that no retention policy exists.

title: Code location instability - gRPC Error code: UNAVAILABLE
reason: Both miss the reference's core point that jobs don't talk to the user code server, but B uses a real env var (DAGSTER_GRPC_MAX_WORKERS) while A fabricates most config options.
